info.title: Cancel or Delete a Video Generation Task
info.description: Cancels a queued video generation task, or deletes a video generation task record.

delete.summary: Cancel or Delete a Video Generation Task
delete.description:
Cancels a queued video generation task, or deletes a video generation task record.

The operation performed by the DELETE API varies depending on the current task status:

| Task Status | Can it be deleted? | Operation Description | Post-DELETE Task Status |
|-------------|---------------------|------------------------|--------------------------|
| queued | Yes | The task is removed from the queue and its status is updated to `cancelled`. | cancelled |
| running | No | - | - |
| succeeded | Yes | The video generation task record is deleted and will no longer be queryable. | - |
| failed | Yes | The video generation task record is deleted and will no longer be queryable. | - |
| cancelled | No | - | - |
| expired | Yes | The video generation task record is deleted and will no longer be queryable. | - |

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the video generation task to be canceled or deleted.

200.description: The task was canceled or the task record was deleted. This API operation has no response parameters.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or unsupported operation for the current task status.

404.description: The video generation task was not found.
